REGION

PLATFORM
1991-07 Streets of Rage / Streets of Rage / Streets of Rage U.S. Sega Mega Drive (Genesis)
1991-08-02 Bare Knuckle: Ikari no Tekken / ベア・ナックル 怒りの鉄拳 / Bare Knuckle: Ikari no Tekken Japan Sega Mega Drive (Genesis)

Credits
  • Mega Drive
  • SMS/GG

Music / MusicYuzo Koshiro / 古代祐三
Sound Assisted by / Sound Assisted byT.N
Sound Effects / Sound EffectsYuzo Koshiro / 古代祐三*
Music / MusicYuzo Koshiro / 古代祐三, Mikito Ichikawa / 市川幹人

Notes

Takayuki Nakamura's previous website's career page listed Streets of Rage, with his role being sound programming. Yuzo Koshiro has confirmed that he created the sound effects.
